svg.title: Daily Backup System — Component & Layer Architecture
svg.text: Daily Backup System (dbs) — Component & Layer Architecture
src/dbs — UI-agnostic core with thin renderers (CLI, Web) and plugin-based source connectors

text.tspan: Only module that prints / reads argv / exits.
Thin renderer over BackupService; adds no
ProgressEvents to the browser via SSE.
UI-agnostic façade returning plain dataclasses; never prints/exits/reads stdin.
backup_source() / backup_all() · status() · history() · export() · verify()
Clock + HTTP-client factory are injected (deterministic tests).
Drives one source's fetch() stream into
ABC so Postgres etc. could swap in later.
Frozen public API every connector imports — gated by CORE_API_VERSION.
